lists.name: London Dentists - Priority Opportunities
lists.description: Dental clinics with visible local SEO gaps, active websites, and usable contact paths.

lists.name: Miami Restoration Companies
lists.description: Emergency and water-damage businesses where SEO improvements can reduce dependency on paid acquisition.

leads.secondaryProblem: Paid ads without strong SEO foundation
leads.whyItMatters: The practice appears commercially viable, uses strong service intent, and still has thin treatment depth that limits organic capture.
leads.outreachAngle: Lead with missed treatment-page coverage and local landing-page expansion.
leads.valueHypothesis: Improving treatment pages and internal linking should convert existing demand into lower-cost organic bookings.
leads.firstLine: Noticed the Euston practice has strong intent terms in play but limited treatment-page depth for local rankings.

leads.secondaryProblem: Paid ads without strong SEO foundation
leads.whyItMatters: Emergency-service demand is high and the company already shows budget intent through paid acquisition.
leads.outreachAngle: Show how local landing pages can reduce paid dependency in high-CPC restoration queries.
leads.valueHypothesis: A focused local SEO build could convert urgent search demand at lower CAC than paid-only traffic.
leads.firstLine: You already look positioned for urgent demand, but the site leaves a lot of local search intent uncaptured.
